policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (p.logistics_role = 'System Admin'::text))))

((actor_id = auth.uid()) OR (approver_id = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Manager'::text, 'Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text]))))))

((requested_by = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Manager'::text, 'Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text]))))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (ll_weekly_reports r
     JOIN ll_user_permissions p ON ((p.user_id = auth.uid())))
  WHERE ((r.id = ll_weekly_assets.report_id) AND ((r.organization = p.organization) OR (p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text]))))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (ll_weekly_reports r
     JOIN ll_user_permissions p ON ((p.user_id = auth.uid())))
  WHERE ((r.id = ll_weekly_projects.report_id) AND ((r.organization = p.organization) OR (p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text]))))))

((organization = ( SELECT p.organization
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE (p.user_id = auth.uid()))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text]))))))

((created_by = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND ((p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Manager'::text, 'Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text])) OR (COALESCE(ll_work_platform_board_posts.related_asset_id, ''::text) = ANY (p.managed_asset_codes)) OR COALESCE(((p.other_asset_permissions ->> 'read'::text))::boolean, false))))))

((created_by = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Manager'::text, 'Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text]))))))

((created_by = auth.uid()) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ll_user_permissions p
  WHERE ((p.user_id = auth.uid()) AND ((p.logistics_role = ANY (ARRAY['Manager'::text, 'Admin'::text, 'System Admin'::text])) OR (COALESCE(ll_work_platform_tasks.related_asset_id, ''::text) = ANY (p.managed_asset_codes)) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM ll_assets a
          WHERE ((a.asset_id = ll_work_platform_tasks.related_asset_id) AND ((a.asset_id = ANY (p.managed_asset_codes)) OR (a.asset_code = ANY (p.managed_asset_codes)))))) OR COALESCE(((p.other_asset_permissions ->> 'read'::text))::boolean, false) OR ((COALESCE(ll_work_platform_tasks.related_asset_id, ''::text) = ''::text) AND (COALESCE(ll_work_platform_tasks.organization, ''::text) = COALESCE(p.organization, ''::text))))))))
